entities.name: manifest.json

entities.name: MG-1_Prompt
entities.context: Prompt/process that generates manifests and manages meeting folder transitions

entities.name: [M] State
entities.context: Workflow state indicating manifest has been generated for a meeting folder

entities.name: _quarantine
entities.context: Destination folder for meetings without valid transcripts

entities.name: stakeholder_intelligence
entities.context: A block type tracked in manifest indicating stakeholder research completion

entities.name: brief

entities.name: Safety Check
entities.context: Principle requiring verification before folder renaming to prevent overwrites

relationships.context: MG-1_Prompt creates manifest.json to track meeting folder status
Manifest generation triggers transition to [M] State via folder renaming
Quarantine is fallback destination when MG-1_Prompt finds no transcript
Safety Check principle applies before transitioning folders to [M] State
